surface_verification.note: spec 94 (atlas-repaint; atlasRepaints=32 on the live WebGL addon — overflow page-add + repack paths) + spec 93 (renderer toggle) green against an isolated single-process real-browser stack

degraded.condition: External LLM code review (Step 8 external / F8)
degraded.reason: requires-prod-credential: no OPENAI_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY in env; the internal shipwright-build:code-reviewer ran instead (no HIGH; its MED on single-event coverage was fixed by subscribing all three atlas-mutation events)

degraded.condition: Visual elimination of the wrong-letter corruption on the user's specific GPU

behaviors.behavior: createEmbeddedXterm subscribes to all three WebGL atlas-mutation events (onChangeTextureAtlas + onAddTextureAtlasCanvas + onRemoveTextureAtlasCanvas) exactly once each
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts 'subscribes to all three atlas-mutation events exactly once each'

behaviors.behavior: Any atlas mutation (change/add/remove) triggers a full-viewport term.refresh(0, rows-1)
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts 'any atlas mutation (change / add / remove) forces a full-viewport term.refresh(0, rows-1)'

behaviors.behavior: The atlas repaint swallows a mid-dispose term throw without crashing
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts 'the atlas repaint swallows a mid-dispose term throw (no crash)'

behaviors.behavior: On the live WebGL addon, real atlas mutations (overflow page-add + repack) fire the handler
behaviors.evidence: e2e flow spec 94 — atlasRepaints=32 on a real-browser WebGL stack (color-overflow page-adds + fontSize repacks)

behaviors.behavior: WebGL-unavailable / DOM-renderer path skips the atlas subscription without crashing (fallback intact)
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.test.ts 'WebGL constructor throwing falls back gracefully' + spec 93 DOM-override arm

behaviors.behavior: The repaint visually eliminates the wrong-letter corruption on the user's specific GPU

enumeration_basis.basis: bug-fix: behaviors enumerated from the diff (no formal ACs). 5 testable behaviors all tested; 1 untestable (real-GPU visual judgment).
